Test: Verify that, delete-token API for credit cards request response is successful
Description: Validate the API response for a successful deletion confirmation
Expected: Send a request to the "Delete Token" API with the corresponding token.

Test: Verify that, a card token cannot be deleted without authentication
Description: Attempt to call the "Delete Token" API without an access token.
Expected: Ensure the API returns an unauthorized (HTTP 401) response

Test: Verify that, attempting to delete a token linked to an active subscription retrieves an error message
Description: Attempt to delete a token linked to an active subscription.
Expected: Validate that the API returns an error message (HTTP 400/409) with an appropriate reason.

Test: Verify that, attempting to delete a card token linked to an active payment plans retrieves an error message
Description: Attempt to delete a token linked to an active payment plans
Expected: Validate that the API returns an error message (HTTP 400/409) with an appropriate reason.

Test: Verify that, a clear error message is displayed when card token cannot be deleted from the Wallet
Description: Attempt to delete a non-existent token, a token linked to a payments plan and an active subscription
Expected: Validate that the API returns a proper error response (e.g., HTTP 404)

Test: Verify that, all types of cards can be deleted via API
Description: Test with different card types Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Discover
Expected: Ensure all can be successfully deleted unless restricted.

Test: Verify that, once a deleted card token is removed, the details are also removed from the Wallet DB
Expected: Query the wallet database to confirm that the token no longer exists after deletion.
